detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BABYPOWELL._transfer(address,address,uint256) (BABYPOWELL.sol#657-781):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (BABYPOWELL.sol#721)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (BABYPOWELL.sol#795-807)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (BABYPOWELL.sol#727)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5)) (BABYPOWELL.sol#815)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5)) (BABYPOWELL.sol#817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BABYPOWELL.sol#779)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (BABYPOWELL.sol#945)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (BABYPOWELL.sol#925)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (BABYPOWELL.sol#927)
	BABYPOWELL._rOwned (BABYPOWELL.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BABYPOWELL._takeTeam(uint256) (BABYPOWELL.sol#939-947)
	- BABYPOWELL._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (BABYPOWELL.sol#899-935)
	- BABYPOWELL.balanceOf(address) (BABYPOWELL.sol#471-475)
	- BABYPOWELL.constructor() (BABYPOWELL.sol#413-443)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BABYPOWELL.sol#779)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (BABYPOWELL.sol#953)
	BABYPOWELL._rTotal (BABYPOWELL.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BABYPOWELL._getCurrentSupply() (BABYPOWELL.sol#1095-1105)
	- BABYPOWELL._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (BABYPOWELL.sol#951-957)
	- BABYPOWELL.constructor() (BABYPOWELL.sol#413-443)
	- BABYPOWELL.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (BABYPOWELL.sol#577-599)

		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (BABYPOWELL.sol#953)

	- _redisFee = _redisFeeOnSell (BABYPOWELL.sol#767)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BABYPOWELL.sol#779)
		- _redisFee = _previousredisFee (BABYPOWELL.sol#647)
		- _redisFee = 0 (BABYPOWELL.sol#615)
